particulars.description: The sum of £5,500 held on deposit as security towards the performance of the company's obligations and liabilities under the terms of an underlease dated the 8TH october 1999.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of an underlease of even date

particulars.description: A specific equitable charge over all freehold and leasehold properties and/or the proceeds of sale thereof fixed and floating charges over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts and the benefits of any licences.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
